content:
What is the Student Work Placement Program (SWPP)?

The "Bread and Butter" of Canadian Startup Hiring

SWPP is not one single program; it is delivered by roughly 12 different "Industry Partners". You apply to the partner that matches the role of the student, not necessarily your industry.

Funding Rates
Standard Student: 50% up to $5,000
Under-represented / 1st Year: 70% up to $7,000

*Includes Women in STEM, Indigenous, Persons with Disabilities, Recent Immigrants.

Top Delivery Partners

  • TECHNATION (Formerly ITAC) Best for: Tech roles (Developers, UX Designers, Product Managers). High volume, good portal.
  • Magnet Best for: General roles. Use Magnet if you don't fit perfectly into a specific niche.
  • BioTalent Best for: Science, Lab techs, Healthcare roles.
  • Venture for Canada Best for: Entrepreneurial students. Bonus: They provide training camps for the students.

Step-by-Step: Getting the Cheque

1

Post Job & Apply

Create account on partner portal (e.g., Technation). Submit job description. Get "Pre-approval".

2

Hire & Add Student

Interview and hire eligible student. Add their proof of citizenship and enrollment to portal.

3

Pay Wages

Run payroll as normal. Student gets full salary. Keep all paystubs.

4

Submit Claims

Upload paystubs at end of term (or mid-term). Receive direct deposit within 6 weeks.

💡 Insider Tip:

Apply BEFORE the student starts. Many partners reject retroactive applications. The safest bet is to apply as soon as you post the job.

What is the Canada Job Grant (CJG)?

Need to train your EXISTING staff? The CJG pays for third-party training. It is provincially administered, so names vary (COJG, CAJG, etc.).

The Deal

Government covers 2/3rds of training costs. You cover 1/3rd.

Example:

$3,000 Course Cost

Gov pays: $2,000

You pay: $1,000

Hiring Unemployed?

If you hire and train an unemployed person, the government covers 100% of training costs (up to $15k).

Total Cover:

$15,000 Training

You pay: $0

Provincial Names
  • Ontario: COJG (Canada-Ontario Job Grant)
  • Alberta: CAJG (Canada-Alberta Job Grant)
  • BC: ETG (Employer Training Grant)
  • Quebec: Workforce Skills Development

What Training Qualifies?

✅ Eligible
  • Third-party trainer (College, Private Institute)
  • "Soft Skills" (Leadership, Sales Training)
  • Technical Certification (PMP, Agile, AWS)
❌ Ineligible
  • Internal training (You teaching your staff)
  • Conferences (Unless there is a curriculum)
  • Product usage training (e.g. standard onboarding)

What is the "Forever Intern" Loop?

You can legally chain grants to keep a student for a full year at 70% off.

  • Summer (May-Aug): Hire via SWPP ($7,000 subsidy).
  • Fall (Sep-Dec): Keep them part-time. use SWPP again (it allows part-time).
  • Graduation (Jan): Hire them full-time using DS4Y ($15,000 subsidy).

Result: You get a fully trained junior employee for ~$15k total cost for the first year.

Why Do Hiring Grants Get Denied?

1. The "Contractor" Trap

You cannot use SWPP or CJG for contractors (1099/T4A). They MUST be on payroll (T4) with CPP/EI deductions. No exceptions.

2. Nepotism

You cannot hire your daughter, son, or spouse. The government checks surnames and addresses.

3. The "Double Dip"

You cannot use two federal grants for the same salary dollar. You CAN stack Provincial + Federal (sometimes), but never Federal + Federal.

4. Paying in Cash

You need an electronic paper trail (Direct Deposit or Cheque images). Cash payments are instantly rejected during the claim audit.

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Hiring & Training Grants  | .9B+ Workforce Development Across 28+ Programs in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Hiring & Training Grants  | .9B+ Workforce Development Across 28+ Programs?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $1.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Student Work Placement Program (SWPP)
expertTip.content: SWPP covers up to 75% of wages (max $7,500) for hiring post-secondary students. It's the most accessible hiring grant available across all industries.
